problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry may resolve How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
